test_scenarios.given: An aws_security_group with ingress rule allowing unrestricted access (0.0.0.0/0) on authorized port 80
An aws_security_group with ingress rule allowing unrestricted access (0.0.0.0/0) on authorized port 443
An aws_security_group with ingress rule allowing unrestricted IPv6 access (::/0) on authorized port 80
An aws_security_group with ingress rule allowing unrestricted access (0.0.0.0/0) on unauthorized port 22
An aws_security_group with ingress rule allowing unrestricted access (0.0.0.0/0) on unauthorized port 3389
An aws_security_group with ingress rule allowing unrestricted access (0.0.0.0/0) with protocol -1 (all protocols)
An aws_security_group with ingress rule allowing restricted access (10.0.0.0/16) on any port
An aws_vpc_security_group_ingress_rule allowing unrestricted IPv4 access (0.0.0.0/0) on authorized port 443
An aws_vpc_security_group_ingress_rule allowing unrestricted IPv4 access (0.0.0.0/0) on unauthorized port 22
An aws_vpc_security_group_ingress_rule allowing unrestricted IPv6 access (::/0) on unauthorized port 3389
An aws_security_group_rule of type ingress allowing unrestricted access (0.0.0.0/0) on authorized port 80
An aws_security_group_rule of type ingress allowing unrestricted access (0.0.0.0/0) on unauthorized port 22
An aws_security_group_rule of type egress allowing unrestricted access (0.0.0.0/0) on any port
test_scenarios.then: The policy should PASS (egress rules are not checked)

test_scenarios.given: An aws_default_security_group with ingress rule allowing unrestricted access (0.0.0.0/0) on authorized port 443
An aws_default_security_group with ingress rule allowing unrestricted access (0.0.0.0/0) on unauthorized port 22
